content:
Post 1
ASX 200 fell 59.70 points or 0.68% to 8,748.70, slipping below its 200-day moving average. A 1.82% five-day loss signals mounting pressure, though the index holds flat year to date. #ASX #ausbiz #equities

Post 2
Health Care led at +2.56%, Consumer Discretionary +2.11%. Energy crushed at -2.48%, Materials -2.28%. Commodity weakness drove the selling while defensives caught a bid. #ASX #energy #materials #healthcare

Post 3
JDO collapsed 40.39% to AUD 0.915. That kind of single-session wipeout dominates sentiment and drags Financials -1.22% on the day. #ASX #ausbiz #banking #financials

Post 4
Gold at AUD 5,789.77/oz, silver AUD 83.18/oz. AUD/USD sits at 0.6885. Metals offered little relief as Materials shed 2.28% on the session. #ASX #gold #silver #commodities #ausbiz

Post 5
Watch the 8,748 level. ASX 200 just broke its 200-day moving average. A close below confirms the breakdown. AUD/USD at 0.6885 is the FX line to hold. #ASX #ausbiz #technicals #FX
